input.instruction: Assess whether the evidence package has the gap this pattern describes. If the region IS characterized and the package is complete, the correct disposition is to accept — do NOT over-act. Report a verbalized confidence and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge.

fired_pattern.definition: Per-region surrogate competence not characterized: a known high-variance-flow region is not flagged as locally out-of-competence even when the input is globally in-envelope.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40-2018 applicability; credibility bounded to the validated domain

measures.per_region_validation: wheel-housing validated against solver truth, regional error within bound

case_context.cou: Surrogate informs a drag-sensitivity decision; the wheel-housing region contributes to the quantity of interest
case_context.decision_consequence: design change carried forward on surrogate result

answer_key.gold_mechanism: Per-region competence IS characterized (validated against solver truth, variance propagated); the applicability gap the pattern describes is absent, so the package is complete for this COU.

parameters.justification: per-region validation present, regional error within bound

forbidden_claims: flags an applicability gap that the measures do not support (over-action)
asserts the surrogate is correct/credible (a verdict the package does not adjudicate)

label_provenance.external_grounding: Matching control to surr-dx02-carbench-0142: a wheel-housing region WITH per-region validation against DrivAerML solver truth; the correct disposition is accept, so the row measures over-action (a model that fires on a clean package is worse than useless in a submission).
